trade.name: Fishing Rod Upgrade
trade.description: Upgrade your fishing rod for better performance and more catches.

trade.name: Venture Out
trade.effect: Unlock a random new fishing location
trade.description: Pay a fee to unlock a new fishing location, expanding your fishing opportunities.

trade.name: Health Potion
trade.description: A potion that restores health, useful after a tough fishing battle.

trade.name: Lucky Necklace
trade.description: A charm said to bring good fortune to those who wear it while fishing.

trade.name: Fishing Guide
trade.description: Ancient knowledge that improves your fishing intuition.

trade.name: Bait Bundle
trade.description: A collection of premium bait to attract better fish.

trade.name: Master Fisher's Blessing
trade.description: A blessing from the master fisherman, said to enhance your skills.
